## Quote Style
- **90% Prefers double quotes** (30/33 files)
  - Examples: `307 double vs 15 single`, `102 double vs 0 single`, `100 double vs 0 single`

## Type Hints
- **90% Uses type hints (30 files)** (30/33 files)
  - Examples: `def func(x: int) -> str:`

## Trailing Commas
- **48% Uses trailing commas in collections and function args (16 files)** (16/33 files)
  - Examples: `80 trailing commas found`, `8 trailing commas found`, `73 trailing commas found`

## Formatters & Linters
- **ruff** -- configured in pyproject.toml [tool.ruff]
  - line-length: 100
  - select: E, F, W, I, N, UP, B, SIM, RUF
  - target-version: py311
- **mypy** -- configured in pyproject.toml [tool.mypy]
  - python_version: 3.11
  - strict: true
